General.Name: Mobvoi Inc
General.Description: Mobvoi Inc., an investment holding company, provides AI software solutions, and sells smart devices and other accessories in Mainland China and internationally. The company operates in three segments: AI software solutions, AI enterprise solutions, and Smart Devices and Other Accessories. It offers artificial intelligence (AI) software solutions, including AI-generated content (AIGC) creator solutions, such as Moyin Workshop, an AI voiceover assistant; Weta365, an AI avatar; AI Ask365, an enterprise AI interactive digital employee generation platform; Yuan365AI, the video creation platform; LivGen, a one-stop digital avatar generation platform; and PMQ Island. The company also provides AI enterprise solutions comprising design of artificial intelligence solution, delivery of software products, software licensing, and integration of products and software. In addition, it develops Xiaowen Mobile Digital Human; Sequence Monkey, a video understanding large language model; voice engine; and 2.5D digital avatar and WetaAvatar 4.0, as well as launch enterprise knowledge assistants, data analysis assistants, and custom process assistants. Further, the company provides smart in-vehicle solutions that includes humanized and intelligent solution; privatize deployment solution including speech recognition, speech synthesis, natural language processing, and interface services; customized sound library solutions; wearables; voice interaction solutions; wenyan-voice dialogue robot; and ToB services for IoT watches and smart hardware. Additionally, it provides smart devices and other accessories; and offers software development services and procurement of raw materials. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
General.Address: Hongfeng Science and Technology Park, Nanjing, China
